fixes.description: Parameterised the SQL query in the user lookup method (was: 'name = ' + name + '', now: 'name = ?' with setParameter).
Replaced the plaintext password comparison in loginUnsafe() with a TODO marker; the method now throws UnsupportedOperationException until BCryptPasswordEncoder.matches() is wired in.
Bumped spring-boot-starter-parent from 3.3.10 to 3.3.13 (transitive fix for CVE-2026-41293, CVE-2026-43512).
Added a default Content-Security-Policy header to the Spring Security filter chain.
